activated_rules.rule_name: General goods description with invoice reference
Mixed origins with per-item origin or invoice reference
EU origin normalization and additional EU members in invoice

consignor.invoice_value: Osstell AB (invoice issuer) and consignor name found in invoice header and address blocks
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Osstell AB' with Swedish address is explicitly identified as invoice issuer (header, footer, address blocks) in invoice. Land Sweden matches exactly after normalization. No contradictory evidence found. Rule 4.1.0 (consignor in invoice text) and 4.1.4 (land match) passed.

consignee.certificate_value: Prime Medical Supplies Est. STORE # 05 - BLOCK A, ICAD - 1 M-41 - 2H1, MUSAFFAH Abu Dhabi UNITED ARAB EMIRATES
consignee.invoice_value: Prime Medical Supplies Est. identified as buyer (invoice address and delivery address) in invoice header
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Prime Medical Supplies Est.' with address in Abu Dhabi, United Arab Emirates is explicitly identified in invoice's invoice address and delivery address blocks. Land matches exactly. Prioritization rules confirm consignee as 'Invoice to' party. No contradictory info.

goods_description.certificate_value: Dental Equipment and Accessories Electronic measurement device for help determining implant stability Beacon instruments SmartPeg accessories
goods_description.invoice_value: Invoice lists multiple product lines including 'Osstell Beacon+', 'SmartPeg Type X' with descriptions and matching product names
goods_description.motivation: Certificate goods descriptions match invoice product lines, supported by exact article numbers (e.g., SEG-25D-422010), and invoice reference ('Inv no: 2694'), meeting priorities 1 (article number exact match) and 3 (general description with invoice reference). Multiple origins specified in certificate (EU-Germany, EU-Sweden) correspond to invoice item origins.

quantity.certificate_value: 1 Kolli Gross weight= 8,7 kg 6 units 62 boxes
quantity.invoice_value: Invoice line items quantities and weights correspond: 6 ea Osstell Beacon+, net weights per line matching certificated total 8.7 kg gross weight
quantity.motivation: Quantities in certificate (6 units, 1 Kolli, gross weight 8.7 kg) clearly correspond to invoice lines listing 6 ea and weights totaling 8.7 kg gross weight. Units and weight units correspond and no contradictory values found.

origin.invoice_value: Invoice indicates origins SE (Sweden) and DE (Germany) for items respectively
origin.motivation: Certificate lists two origins (EU-Sweden and EU-Germany). Invoice explicitly states origins as SE and DE per item. EU normalization allows interchange of EU and member states. All certificate origins explicitly found in invoice, complying with mixed origin and EU normalization rules.

overall_assessment.decision_summary: Alla relevanta kontrollpunkter är verifierade med hög säkerhet och inga avvikelser eller oklarheter föreligger. Dokumenten kan godkännas automatiskt.
overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter stämmer helt. Dokumenten är konsekventa och kan godkännas automatiskt utan vidare manuell granskning.
